Bus Timings

22 Bus Timings Detailed Route from Dubai Courts to Al Nahda 1, Terminus

January 19, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 22 in Dubai provides a convenient transportation option connecting various key locations within the city. It operates between Dubai Courts and Al Nahda 1, Terminus, offering a seamless travel experience for both commuters and visitors. The bus serves major landmarks, educational institutions, and residential areas, making it a crucial link in Dubai’s public transportation network.

Route Name 22
Route Description Dubai Courts - Al Nahda 1, Terminus
Total Distance Approximately 10 to 20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-40 minutes
Operational Hours 09:25 to 19:10 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 22

Bus 22 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

From Dubai Courts From Al Nahda 1, Terminus
09:25 09:39
09:40 09:57
09:55 10:15
10:15 10:40
10:40 11:00
11:00 17:00
17:20 17:20
17:45 17:40
18:10 18:00
18:28 18:20
18:50 18:40
19:10 19:05

Bus 22 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the 22 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 22 is AED 5. Additionally, the fare structure is straightforward, avoiding the complexity of tiered pricing.

Bus Booking

For convenience, passengers can use the RTA’s official website or mobile app for route information and schedules. Passengers can also check real-time bus arrivals using the RTA app for better travel planning.

Bus Route

The Bus 22 route includes the following stops:

  1. Dubai Courts

  2. Deira City Center Bus Station · 1

  3. City Centre Metro · 2

  4. Shabab Al Ahli Club

  5. Stadium Metro

  6. Ministry Of Information

  7. Sheikh Rashid Colony

  8. Emirates Driving Institute

  9. Ministry Of Human Resources & Emiratisation

  10. Dubai Womens College

  11. Dubai Womens College, 3

  12. Dubai Womens College Main Entrance

  13. Al Nahda, Al Ameen Private School

  14. Al Nahda, 19A Street

  15. Madina Supermarket

  16. 12th Street

  17. Canary Building

  18. Masjid Rada

  19. Al Banai

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Burj Al Nahda

  2. Zaafranah

  3. Burj Al Noor

  4. Al Nahda 1, Terminus

  5. Al Nahda 1, Terminus

The route loops back from Al Nahda 1, Terminus to Dubai Courts, ensuring comprehensive coverage of the area.

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the F37, which runs from Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station to Shami Tower and back, as well as the X23, which travels from Al Ghubaiba to International City Bus Station.

Bus 22 Station Overview

Dubai Courts

The Dubai Courts bus station is strategically located near the Dubai Courts complex, a central hub for legal and judicial services in Dubai. This station caters to individuals visiting or working at the courts, providing essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its proximity to the courts makes it a convenient stop for those involved in legal proceedings or administrative matters, facilitating easy access to the judicial facilities. The station’s design and services are tailored to accommodate the needs of its users, ensuring a smooth and efficient transit experience.

Intersection at Al Nahda, Park 1 Bus Stop

The Al Nahda, Park 1 Bus Stop is a key transit point where F21 and 22 intersect. This strategic location facilitates smooth connections between these routes, providing passengers with convenient options for travel in the Al Nahda area. The bus stop’s central position enhances accessibility and streamlines the commuting experience for travelers using these routes.

Al Nahda 1, Terminus

Al Nahda 1, Terminus is a key bus station situated in the Al Nahda 1 area, serving as a central transit point for residents and commuters.

It offers amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a smooth travel experience. Its strategic location in a busy commercial and residential area provides easy access to local shops, services, and nearby neighborhoods. By facilitating seamless connections between various routes, the terminus plays a crucial role in efficient transportation within and beyond the Al Nahda area, making it a vital hub for commuters across Dubai.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Several notable destinations and attractions are along the Bus 22 route:

  1. Deira City Center: A major shopping mall in Deira offering a variety of retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. City Centre Metro Station: Provides access to the Red Line of the Dubai Metro, connecting to various parts of the city and key attractions.

  3. Shabab Al Ahli Club: A well-known sports club in Dubai, offering facilities for various sports and events.

  4. Stadium Metro Station: Located near the Dubai Sports City, which hosts numerous sporting events and entertainment activities.

  5. Dubai Women’s College: Part of the Higher Colleges of Technology, this educational institution is an important center for higher education in Dubai.

  6. Madina Supermarket: A local supermarket offering a range of groceries and goods, reflecting the local shopping experience.

  7. Dubai Municipality Nursery: Although not a tourist attraction, it is a notable local institution.

  8. Burj Al Nahda: A residential and commercial area offering a glimpse into local Dubai life.

  9. Zaafranah: A vibrant locality with residential and commercial spaces, providing insight into Dubai’s diverse neighborhoods.

  10. Burj Al Noor: An area with various shops and local attractions.

These locations offer a mix of shopping, education, sports, and local culture, making Bus 22 a route that connects both practical destinations and interesting points of interest.

Journey Experience

Despite its length, the route offers an engaging look at Dubai’s dynamic city life, transitioning from the central legal district to quieter suburban living, making it an insightful trip for anyone exploring the city.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Al Nahda 1, Terminus, the furthest point on the Bus 22 route starting from Dubai Courts. Using the Hala Taxi option within the app, the estimated fare ranges from AED 42 to AED 51, providing a convenient and reliable way to reach your destination. The app also offers real-time updates and route information to enhance your travel experience.

In conclusion, Bus 22 is an integral part of Dubai’s public transport system, offering frequent service and connecting significant locations across the city. With its affordable fare and comprehensive route, it caters well to the needs of commuters and travelers. Its consistent scheduling and wide coverage make it a reliable option for navigating Dubai efficiently.

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
